records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Idris who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Waqiya every Friday eve, Allah would love him and create his love in the hearts of the people. He would keep that person away from misfortune, poverty, helplessness and calamities of the world. That person will be among the companions of Amirul Momineen (a.s.). This Surah is completely related to Amirul Momineen (a.s.) only and no one else.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی کُلِّ لَیْلَهِ جُمُعَهٍ الْوَاقِعَهَ أَحَبَّهُ اللَّهُ وَ أَحَبَّهُ إِلَی النَّاسِ أَجْمَعِینَ وَ لَمْ یَرَ فِی الدُّنْیَا بُؤْساً أَبَداً وَ لَا فَقْراً وَ لَا فَاقَهً وَ لَا آفَهً مِنْ آفَاتِ الدُّنْیَا وَ کَانَ مِنْ رُفَقَاءِ أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع وَ هَذِهِ السُّورَهُ لِأَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع خَاصَّهً لَا یَشْرَکُهُ فِیهَا أَحَدٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Idris who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan b. Ali from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Waqiya every Friday eve, Allah would love him and create his love in the hearts of the people. He would keep that person away from misfortune, poverty, helplessness and calamities of the world. That person will be among the companions of Amirul Momineen (a.s.). This Surah is completely related to Amirul Momineen (a.s.) only and no one else.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) says, “One who wants to know about  Paradise  should  recite  Surah  Waqiya  and  one  who wants to know about Hell should recite Surah Luqman.”
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَعْرُوفٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَمْزَهَ قَالَ قَالَ الصَّادِقُ ع مَنِ اشْتَاقَ إِلَی الْجَنَّهِ وَ إِلَی صِفَتِهَا فَلْیَقْرَأِ الْوَاقِعَهَ وَ مَنْ أَحَبَّ أَنْ یَنْظُرَ إِلَی صِفَهِ النَّارِ فَلْیَقْرَأْ سَجْدَهَ لُقْمَانَ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 3. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas from Hamad from ’Amru from Zayd al-Shaham from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: One who recites Waqiya every night before going to sleep would meet Allah while his face would be like the moon on a full moon night.
records.arabicText: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنِ الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنْ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زَیْدٍ الشَّحَّامِ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْوَاقِعَهَ کُلَّ لَیْلَهٍ قَبْلَ أَنْ یَنَامَ لَقِیَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ وَجْهُهُ کَالْقَمَرِ لَیْلَهَ الْبَدْرِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 3. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from al-Abbas from Hamad from ’Amru from Zayd al-Shaham from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: One who recites Waqiya every night before going to sleep would meet Allah while his face would be like the moon on a full moon night.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Hadid and Mujadila
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Hadid and Mujadila in obligatory prayers regularly, Allah will not involve him in chastisement till his death. He and his family will not face any difficulty and his body will remain proper and flawless.”
records.arabicText: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِدْرِیسَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَسَّانَ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْحَدِیدِ وَ الْمُجَادَلَهِ فِی صَلَاهٍ فَرِیضَهٍ أَدْمَنَهَا لَمْ یُعَذِّبْهُ اللَّهُ حَتَّی یَمُوتَ أَبَداً وَ لَا یَرَی فِی نَفْسِهِ وَ لَا أَهْلِهِ سُوءاً أَبَداً وَ لَا خَصَاصَهً فِی بَدَنِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Ahmad b. Idris from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Ismail b. Mihran from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Hadid and Mujadila in obligatory prayers regularly, Allah will not involve him in chastisement till his death. He and his family will not face any difficulty and his body will remain proper and flawless.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) said: Whoever recites Surah Hashr none from among Paradise, Hell, Arsh (Allah’s Throne) Chair, Curtains, the seven Skies, the Seven earths, space, wind, birds, trees, mountains, Sun, Moon, and angels would miss seeking forgiveness for him and yearning for his safety. If that man dies that day or that night he would die a martyr.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ الْکِنْدِیِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْوَاحِدِ عَنْ أَبِی الْعَلِیِّ [الْخَلِیلِ] یَرْفَعُ الْحَدِیثَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ زَیْدٍ عَنْ جُذْعَانَ عَنْ زِرِّ بْنِ حُبَیْشٍ عَنْ أُبَیِّ بْنِ کَعْبٍ عَنِ النَّبِیِّ ص قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْحَشْرِ لَمْ یَبْقَ جَنَّهٌ وَ لَا نَارٌ وَ لَا عَرْشٌ وَ لَا کُرْسِیٌّ وَ لَا الْحُجُبُ وَ السَّمَاوَاتُ السَّبْعُ وَ الْأَرَضُونَ السَّبْعُ وَ الْهَوَاءُ وَ الرِّیحُ وَ الطَّیْرُ وَ الشَّجَرُ وَ الْجِبَالُ وَ الشَّمْسُ وَ الْقَمَرُ وَ الْمَلَائِکَهُ إِلَّا صَلَّوْا عَلَیْهِ وَ اسْتَغْفَرُوا لَهُ وَ إِنْ مَاتَ فِی یَوْمِهِ أَوْ لَیْلَتِهِ مَاتَ شَهِیداً.
records.thaqalaynMatn: The Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) said: Whoever recites Surah Hashr none from among Paradise, Hell, Arsh (Allah’s Throne) Chair, Curtains, the seven Skies, the Seven earths, space, wind, birds, trees, mountains, Sun, Moon, and angels would miss seeking forgiveness for him and yearning for his safety. If that man dies that day or that night he would die a martyr.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Ali b. al-Hussain (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Mumtahena in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah examines his heart for belief, and brightens his sight and he is never ever afflicted with poverty, insanity in himself or his children.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْخَیَّاطِ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الثُّمَالِیِّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمُمْتَحِنَهِ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ امْتَحَنَ اللَّهُ قَلْبَهُ لِلْإِیمَانِ وَ نَوَّرَ لَهُ بَصَرَهُ وَ لَا یُصِیبُهُ فَقْرٌ أَبَداً وَ لَا جُنُونٌ فِی بَدَنِهِ وَ لَا فِی وُلْدِهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Ali b. al-Hussain (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Mumtahena in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah examines his heart for belief, and brightens his sight and he is never ever afflicted with poverty, insanity in himself or his children.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Saff and is regular in reciting it in the obligatory prayers, Allah includes him in the row of His angels, prophets and messengers, Insha Allah.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الصَّفِّ وَ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَتَهَا فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ صَفَّهُ اللَّهُ مَعَ مَلَائِکَتِهِ وَ أَنْبِیَائِهِ الْمُرْسَلِینَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: One who recites Surah Saff and is regular in reciting it in the obligatory prayers, Allah includes him in the row of His angels, prophets and messengers, Insha Allah.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Juma, Munafiqun and Aala
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Mansur b. Hazim from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “It is obligatory on every believer who is our Shia to recite Surah Juma and Surah Aala every Friday eve, and recite Surah Juma and Munafiqun in Friday noon prayer. A person doing so is like a person who is performing the deed of the Messenger of Allah (sw). The reward of this deed is that Allah would grant him Paradise.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ حَازِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: الْوَاجِبُ عَلَی کُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ إِذَا کَانَ لَنَا شِیعَهً أَنْ یَقْرَأَ فِی لَیْلَهِ الْجُمُعَهِ بِالْجُمُعَهِ وَ سَبِّحِ اسْمَ رَبِّکَ الْأَعْلَی وَ فِی صَلَاهِ الظُّهْرِ بِالْجُمُعَهِ وَ الْمُنَافِقِینَ فَإِذَا فَعَلَ ذَلِکَ فَکَأَنَّمَا یَعْمَلُ کَعَمَلِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص وَ کَانَ جَزَاؤُهُ وَ ثَوَابُهُ عَلَی اللَّهِ الْجَنَّهَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Mansur b. Hazim from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “It is obligatory on every believer who is our Shia to recite Surah Juma and Surah Aala every Friday eve, and recite Surah Juma and Munafiqun in Friday noon prayer. A person doing so is like a person who is performing the deed of the Messenger of Allah (sw). The reward of this deed is that Allah would grant him Paradise.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Taghabun in his obligatory prayers it will intercede for him on the Day of Judgment, offer evidence for him in justice, near one who considers its testimony justified for himself, it would not separate from him till it has him admitted in Paradise.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ التَّغَابُنِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ کَانَتْ شَفِیعَهً لَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ شَاهِدَ عَدْلٍ عِنْدَ مَنْ یُجِیزُ شَهَادَتَهَا ثُمَّ لَا یُفَارِقُهَا حَتَّی یَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّهَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: One who recites Surah Taghabun in his obligatory prayers it will intercede for him on the Day of Judgment, offer evidence for him in justice, near one who considers its testimony justified for himself, it would not separate from him till it has him admitted in Paradise.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 2.  Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) said, “One who recites all the recommendations before going to bed will not die until he sees Qaim-e-Aale Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and if he dies he will  get  place  in  the  neighborhood  of  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.).”
records.arabicText: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مِسْکِینٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ بَکْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ بِالْمُسَبَّحَاتِ کُلِّهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ یَنَامَ لَمْ یَمُتْ حَتَّی یُدْرِکَ الْقَائِمَ ع وَ إِنْ مَاتَ کَانَ فِی جِوَارِ النَّبِیِّ ص.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Talaq and Tahrim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Ali from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Talaq and Tahrim in his obligatory prayers the Almighty Allah would protect him from the fear of the Day of Judgment and save him from Hell. He would enter Paradise due to recitation of these Surahs for they are related to the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.).”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیٍّ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الطَّلَاقِ وَ التَّحْرِیمِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَعَاذَهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ أَنْ یَکُونَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِمَّنْ یَخَافُ أَوْ یَحْزَنُ وَ عُوفِیَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَ أَدْخَلَهُ اللَّهُ الْجَنَّهَ بِتِلَاوَتِهِ إِیَّاهُمَا وَ مُحَافَظَتِهِ عَلَیْهِمَا لِأَنَّهُمَا لِلنَّبِیِّ ص.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Ali from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Talaq and Tahrim in his obligatory prayers the Almighty Allah would protect him from the fear of the Day of Judgment and save him from Hell. He would enter Paradise due to recitation of these Surahs for they are related to the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.).”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Mulk before going to bed or in his obligatory prayers would remain safe till morning. Also he would remain in Allah’s protection till he enters Paradise.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ تَبارَکَ الَّذِی بِیَدِهِ الْمُلْکُ فِی الْمَکْتُوبَهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ یَنَامَ لَمْ یَزَلْ فِی أَمَانِ اللَّهِ حَتَّی یُصْبِحَ وَ فِی أَمَانِهِ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ حَتَّی یَدْخُلَ الْجَنَّهَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from his father from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Mulk before going to bed or in his obligatory prayers would remain safe till morning. Also he would remain in Allah’s protection till he enters Paradise.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam as-Sadiq (a.s.) says: Whoever recites Surah “Noon wal  Qalam”  in  his  obligatory  or  recommended  prayers, Allah  would  always  keep  him  safe  and  protected  from destitution  and  poverty,  and  when  that  man  dies,  Allah would grant him exemption from the squeeze of the grave.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَیْمُونٍ الصَّائِغِ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ ن وَ الْقَلَمِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَوْ نَافِلَهٍ آمَنَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْ أَنْ یُصِیبَهُ فَقْرٌ أَبَداً وَ أَعَاذَهُ اللَّهُ إِذَا مَاتَ مِنْ ضَمَّهِ الْقَبْرِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1.  Imam as-Sadiq (a.s.) says:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Whoever recites Surah “Noon wal  Qalam”  in  his  obligatory  or  recommended  prayers, Allah  would  always  keep  him  safe  and  protected  from destitution  and  poverty,  and  when  that  man  dies,  Allah would grant him exemption from the squeeze of the grave.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muhammad b. Miskeen from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Recite Surah Haqqah very often because recitation of Surah Haqqah in obligatory and recommended prayers is a sign of belief in Allah and His Prophet. It is related to Amirul Momineen (a.s.) and Muawiyah and the religion of the reciter would not remain doubtful and uncertain till he meets Allah.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مِسْکِینٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَکْثِرُوا مِنْ قِرَاءَهِ الْحَاقَّهِ فَإِنَّ قِرَاءَتَهَا فِی الْفَرَائِضِ وَ النَّوَافِلِ مِنَ الْإِیمَانِ بِاللَّهِ وَ رَسُولِهِ لِأَنَّهَا إِنَّمَا نَزَلَتْ فِی أَمِیرِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ ع وَ مُعَاوِیَهَ وَ لَمْ یُسْلَبْ قَارِیهَا دِینَهُ حَتَّی یَلْقَی اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muhammad b. Miskeen from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Recite Surah Haqqah very often because recitation of Surah Haqqah in obligatory and recommended prayers is a sign of belief in Allah and His Prophet. It is related to Amirul Momineen (a.s.) and Muawiyah and the religion of the reciter would not remain doubtful and uncertain till he meets Allah.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muhammad b. Miskeen from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: You people should recite “Sa’ala Saa-elun” (Surah Ma’arij) very much, because whoever recites Surah Ma’arij very much Allah would not count his mistakes on the Day of Judgment, and that man would be in Paradise with the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.), if Allah wills.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مِسْکِینٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَکْثِرُوا مِنْ قِرَاءَهِ سَأَلَ سَائِلٌ فَإِنَّ مَنْ أَکْثَرَ قِرَاءَتَهَا لَمْ یَسْأَلْهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَی یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ عَنْ ذَنْبٍ عَمِلَهُ وَ أَسْکَنَهُ الْجَنَّهَ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muhammad b. Miskeen from ’Amru b. Shimr from Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: You people should recite “Sa’ala Saa-elun” (Surah Ma’arij) very much, because whoever recites Surah Ma’arij very much Allah would not count his mistakes on the Day of Judgment, and that man would be in Paradise with the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.), if Allah wills.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Hashim from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever has belief and firm conviction on Allah should not miss recitation of “Inna Arsalna Noohan ilaa Qaumeh” (i.e. Surah Nuh) because whoever recites Surah Nuh in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah would allow him to stay with the virtuous and approved persons of Allah and would award him three gardens of Paradise with his garden by His special favors. He would marry the reciter to two hundred Hoorul Ein and four thousand other women.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ هَاشِمٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ کَانَ یُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَ یَقْرَأُ کِتَابَهُ لَا یَدَعُ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنا نُوحاً إِلی قَوْمِهِ فَأَیُّ عَبْدٍ قَرَأَهَا مُحْتَسِباً صَابِراً فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَوْ نَافِلَهٍ أَسْکَنَهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَی مَسَاکِنَ الْأَبْرَارِ وَ أَعْطَاهُ ثَلَاثَ جِنَانٍ مَعَ جَنَّتِهِ کَرَامَهً مِنَ اللَّهِ وَ زَوَّجَهُ مِائَتَیْ حَوْرَاءَ وَ أَرْبَعَهَ آلَافِ ثَیِّبٍ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Hashim from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever has belief and firm conviction on Allah should not miss recitation of
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Inna Arsalna Noohan ilaa Qaumeh” (i.e. Surah Nuh) because whoever recites Surah Nuh in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah would allow him to stay with the virtuous and approved persons of Allah and would award him three gardens of Paradise with his garden by His special favors. He would marry the reciter to two hundred Hoorul Ein and four thousand other women.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from Hanan b. Sadeer from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites it often would neither be affected by the evil eye of Jinn in his worldly life, nor can there be any effect on him of sorcery, now can any harm occur to him through any kind of machination or Satanic action of the Jinn. Also the reciter of Surah Jinn would be in the company of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his Progeny (a.s.).
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَکْثَرَ قِرَاءَهَ قُلْ أُوحِیَ إِلَیَ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ فِی الْحَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا شَیْ ءٌ مِنْ أَعْیُنِ الْجِنِّ وَ لَا نَفْثِهِمْ وَ لَا سِحْرِهِمْ وَ لَا مِنْ کَیْدِهِمْ وَ کَانَ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فَیَقُولُ یَا رَبِّ لَا أُرِیدُ بِهِ بَدَلًا وَ لَا أُرِیدُ أَنْ أَبْغِیَ عَنْهُ حِوَلًا.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from Hanan b. Sadeer from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Whoever recites it often would neither be affected by the evil eye of Jinn in his worldly life, nor can there be any effect on him of sorcery, now can any harm occur to him through any kind of machination or Satanic action of the Jinn. Also the reciter of Surah Jinn would be in the company of the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) and his Progeny (a.s.).

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Mansur b. Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Muzzammil in Isha prayer or during last part of night, the night and the day will bear witness along with Surah Muzzammil for him and the Almighty Allah will grant him pure life and death.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمُزَّمِّلِ فِی الْعِشَاءِ الْآخِرَهِ أَوْ فِی آخِرِ اللَّیْلِ کَانَ لَهُ اللَّیْلُ وَ النَّهَارُ شَاهِدَیْنِ مَعَ سُورَهِ الْمُزَّمِّلِ وَ أَحْیَاهُ اللَّهُ حَیَاهً طَیِّبَهً وَ أَمَاتَهُ مِیتَهً طَیِّبَهً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Sayf b. ’Umayra from Mansur b. Jabir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Muzzammil in Isha prayer or during last part of night, the night and the day will bear witness along with Surah Muzzammil for him and the Almighty Allah will grant him pure life and death.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Muddassir in his obligatory Salaat it is the duty of Allah to give him a status along with Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and he will not face any difficulty in his worldly life, God-Willing.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْخَیَّاطِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدٍ الْبَاقِرِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْفَرِیضَهِ سُورَهَ الْمُدَّثِّرِ کَانَ حَقّاً عَلَی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ أَنْ یَجْعَلَهُ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص فِی دَرَجَتِهِ وَ لَا یُدْرِکُهُ فِی حَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا شَقَاءٌ أَبَداً إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Muhammad b. Muslim from Abi Ja’far Muhammad al-Baqir (a.s.) who said: Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.),
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Muddassir in his obligatory Salaat it is the duty of Allah to give him a status along with Muhammad (s.a.w.s.) and he will not face any difficulty in his worldly life, God-Willing.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Qiyamat regularly and acts upon it, Allah would raise him from the grave with the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) in the best form. He would be given glad-tiding and he would pass through Sirat and Mizan smiling.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَدْمَنَ قِرَاءَهَ لا أُقْسِمُ وَ کَانَ یَعْمَلُ بِهَا بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ص مِنْ قَبْرِهِ فِی أَحْسَنِ صُورَهٍ وَ یُبَشِّرُهُ وَ یَضْحَکُ فِی وَجْهِهِ حَتَّی یَجُوزَ عَلَی الصِّرَاطِ وَ الْمِیزَانِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Whoever recites Surah Qiyamat regularly and acts upon it, Allah would raise him from the grave with the Messenger of Allah (s.a.w.s.) in the best form. He would be given glad-tiding and he would pass through Sirat and Mizan smiling.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam  Muhammad  Baqir  (a.s.)  said,  “One  who  recites Surah Insan in the morning of every Thursday Allah would marry   him   to   eight   hundred   virgin   women   and   four thousand  women  who  had  been  married  previously  and give him one more Hoorul Ein and company of Muhammad (s.a.w.s.).”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ جُبَیْرٍ الْعَزْرَمِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ هَلْ أَتی عَلَی الْإِنْسانِ فِی کُلِّ غَدَاهِ خَمِیسٍ زَوَّجَهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الْحُورِ الْعِینِ ثَمَانَمِائَهِ عَذْرَاءَ وَ أَرْبَعَ آلَافِ ثَیِّبٍ وَ حَوْرَاءَ مِنَ الْحُورِ الْعِینِ وَ کَانَ مَعَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص.

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Mursalaat, Naba and Nazia’at
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. ’Amru al-Rummani from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Whoever recites it, it becomes a way of sincerity and a means of affection between him and Prophet Muhammad (s.a.w.s.). If one recites “Amma Yatasaa-aloon” (Surah Naba) daily for one year a year would not pass but he would have the honor of paying homage to the Holy House of Allah, if Allah wills. One who recites Surah Nazia’at, would not die except as cheerful and hearty, and Allah would not raise him from the grave but in happy and pleasant state, and he would not enter Paradise except as happy and joyful.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو الرُّمَّانِیِّ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ الْمُرْسَلاتِ عُرْفاً عَرَّفَ اللَّهُ بَیْنَهُ وَ بَیْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ص وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ عَمَّ یَتَساءَلُونَ لَمْ تَخْرُجْ سَنَتُهُ إِذَا کَانَ یُدْمِنُهَا کُلَّ یَوْمٍ حَتَّی یَزُورَ بَیْتَ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ وَ مَنْ قَرَأَ وَ النَّازِعَاتِ لَمْ یَمُتْ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً وَ لَمْ یَبْعَثْهُ اللَّهُ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً وَ لَمْ یُدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّهَ إِلَّا رَیَّاناً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. ’Amru al-Rummani from his father from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Whoever recites it, it becomes a way of sincerity and a means of affection between him and Prophet Muhammad (s.a.w.s.). If one recites “Amma Yatasaa-aloon” (Surah Naba) daily for one year a year would not pass but he would have the honor of paying homage to the Holy House of Allah, if Allah wills. One who recites Surah Nazia’at, would not die except as cheerful and hearty, and Allah would not raise him from the grave but in happy and pleasant state, and he would not enter Paradise except as happy and joyful.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Abas and Takwir
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muawiyah b. Wahab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Abas and Takrim would remain under the shade of Allah and would remain safe from usurping others’ property. He would receive favor of Allah and go to Paradise. And it is not a big thing for Almighty Allah.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ مُعَاوِیَهَ بْنِ وَهْبٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ عَبَسَ وَ تَوَلَّی وَ إِذَا الشَّمْسُ کُوِّرَتْ کَانَ تَحْتَ جَنَاحِ اللَّهِ مِنَ الْجِنَانِ وَ فِی ظِلِّ اللَّهِ وَ کَرَامَتِهِ فِی جِنَانِهِ وَ لَا یَعْظُمُ ذَلِکَ عَلَی اللَّهِ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Muawiyah b. Wahab from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: “One who recites Surah Abas and Takrim would remain under the shade of Allah and would remain safe from usurping others’ property. He would receive favor of Allah and go to Paradise. And it is not a big thing for Almighty Allah.”

records.chapter: Reward of reciting Surah Infitar and Surah Inshiqaq
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.), “One who recites Surah Infitar and  Surah  Inshiqaq  in  his  obligatory  and  recommended prayer, Allah will eliminate all the barriers to the fulfillment of  his desires. There would be nothing to stop him. Allah will look at him with mercy till accounting of deeds of all the people is done.”
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ أَبِی الْعَلَاءِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع یَقُولُ مَنْ قَرَأَ هَاتَیْنِ السُّورَتَیْنِ وَ جَعَلَهُمَا نُصْبَ عَیْنِهِ فِی صَلَاهِ الْفَرِیضَهِ وَ النَّافِلَهِ لَمْ یَحْجُبْهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ حَاجَهٍ وَ لَمْ یَحْجُزْهُ مِنَ اللَّهِ حَاجِزٌ وَ لَمْ یَزَلْ یَنْظُرُ إِلَیْهِ حَتَّی یَفْرُغَ مِنْ حِسَابِ النَّاسِ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.translator: Sayed Athar Husain Rizvi & Sayed Maqsood Athar
records.englishText: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Safwan al-Jamal from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: Whoever recites Surah Mutaffifeen in his obligatory prayers, Allah would keep him safe from the fire of Hell on the Day of Judgment, neither would the fire of Hell see him nor will he see the fire of Hell, and the reciter of Surah Mutaffifeen would not have to pass over the bridge of Hell, not would face any questioning on the Day of Judgment.
records.arabicText: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ الْجَمَّالِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ قَرَأَ فِی الْفَرِیضَهِ وَیْلٌ لِلْمُطَفِّفِینَ أَعْطَاهُ اللَّهُ الْأَمْنَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِنَ النَّارِ وَ لَمْ تَرَهُ وَ لَا یَرَاهَا وَ لَمْ یَمُرَّ عَلَی جِسْرِ جَهَنَّمَ وَ لَا یُحَاسَبُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Safwan al-Jamal from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Whoever recites Surah Mutaffifeen in his obligatory prayers, Allah would keep him safe from the fire of Hell on the Day of Judgment, neither would the fire of Hell see him nor will he see the fire of Hell, and the reciter of Surah Mutaffifeen would not have to pass over the bridge of Hell, not would face any questioning on the Day of Judgment.
